title: Isolepis dissoluta
taxonomy: Isolepis dissoluta is classified as a species of sedge, belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is a part of the genus Isolepis, which consists of various species of sedges. The family Cyperaceae is a large and diverse group of monocotyledonous plants, commonly known as sedges and rushes. The genus Isolepis is typically found in wetland environments and is native to different parts of the world. This classification helps to identify and understand the characteristics and distribution of Isolepis dissoluta.
